case_title: LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. MARITZA HURTADO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR FIRST FRANKLIN MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2007-FF2, MORTGAGE LOAN ASSET-BACKED CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-FF2 AS TO DEFENDANT HURTADO, MARITZA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HURTADO, MARITZA
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT HURTADO, MARITZA HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT HURTADO, MARITZA HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT; P/A FILED BY PLAINTIFF LASALLE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR FIRST FRANKLIN MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2007-FF2, MORTGAGE LOAN ASSET-BACKED CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-FF2
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MARITZA HURTADO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS PREMISED ON CASE NO. 626630 PENDING BETWEEN THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF SHOWS THAT A 3RD CASE NO. 625562 WAS DISMISSED BUT DOES NOT ADDRESS 626630. THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS SHOW 626630 AS STILL PENDING BETWEEN THESE PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT HURTADO, MARITZA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MARITZA HURTADO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. MARITZA HURTADO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: PATTY LEE HUBBLE CSR# 3058 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF MARITZA HURTADO ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
